## Meeting Purpose

[Review client project statuses and align on next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/gyyn_sSZT4ZkS79ksGHmzV5xsbEzy92H?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**SpectraOps:** Awaiting review from the key decision-maker (Meshack) to prevent scope creep from non-decision-makers.](https://fathom.video/share/gyyn_sSZT4ZkS79ksGHmzV5xsbEzy92H?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)
  - [**Base 10:** Developing three distinct content strategies (glossary, beginner's guide, Reddit pipeline) to present to the client for a focused workstream decision.](https://fathom.video/share/gyyn_sSZT4ZkS79ksGHmzV5xsbEzy92H?tab=summary&timestamp=974.0)
  - [**Hyper-exponential:** Staging 5 articles today; will push the client on stalled SME reviews and address their off-intent content ideas.](https://fathom.video/share/gyyn_sSZT4ZkS79ksGHmzV5xsbEzy92H?tab=summary&timestamp=1526.0)
  - [**Atlas Workflow:** Custom outlines are critical for quality drafts; AI-generated content requires heavy manual editing to fix common issues like incorrect stats and hypothetical examples.](https://fathom.video/share/gyyn_sSZT4ZkS79ksGHmzV5xsbEzy92H?tab=summary&timestamp=526.0)

## Topics

### Client Strategy & Content Direction

#### SpectraOps

  - [**Problem:** Feedback from non-decision-makers (Rick, Teofi) risks derailing the SEO strategy by pushing for a technical, product-focused blog style that conflicts with the client's enterprise goals.](https://fathom.video/share/gyyn_sSZT4ZkS79ksGHmzV5xsbEzy92H?tab=summary&timestamp=327.0)
  - [**Solution:** Erik will follow up with the key decision-maker (Meshack) today to ensure he reviews the Content OS presentation and Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/gyyn_sSZT4ZkS79ksGHmzV5xsbEzy92H?tab=summary&timestamp=448.0)

#### Base 10

  - [**Problem:** The client is exploring new content formats, requiring a strategic pivot.](https://fathom.video/share/gyyn_sSZT4ZkS79ksGHmzV5xsbEzy92H?tab=summary&timestamp=974.0)
  - [**Solution:** Sydney is developing three distinct strategies to present to the client for a focused workstream decision.](https://fathom.video/share/gyyn_sSZT4ZkS79ksGHmzV5xsbEzy92H?tab=summary&timestamp=1084.0)
    1.  **Glossary:** Replicate the client's successful "modal glossary" (100–1000 words, no H2s/H3s, experience-based).
          - [Testing a dedicated agentic pipeline and building a content OS structure to map term interlinking.](https://fathom.video/share/gyyn_sSZT4ZkS79ksGHmzV5xsbEzy92H?tab=summary&timestamp=1036.0)
    2.  [**Beginner's Guide:** A learning section on the blog for a specific audience.](https://fathom.video/share/gyyn_sSZT4ZkS79ksGHmzV5xsbEzy92H?tab=summary&timestamp=1103.0)
    3.  [**Reddit Pipeline:** Posting content directly to Reddit.](https://fathom.video/share/gyyn_sSZT4ZkS79ksGHmzV5xsbEzy92H?tab=summary&timestamp=1123.0)
  - [**Decision:** Defer design mockups until the client approves a content direction.](https://fathom.video/share/gyyn_sSZT4ZkS79ksGHmzV5xsbEzy92H?tab=summary&timestamp=1084.0)

#### Hyper-exponential

  - [**Problem:** The client's content ideas are often too technical or thought-leadership-focused, lacking sufficient search volume for an effective SEO strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/gyyn_sSZT4ZkS79ksGHmzV5xsbEzy92H?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [**Solution:** Aida used Claude to generate viable seed keywords from the client's ideas, demonstrating how to bridge the gap between their vision and SEO reality.](https://fathom.video/share/gyyn_sSZT4ZkS79ksGHmzV5xsbEzy92H?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [**Action:** Bailey will use these findings to set expectations and guide the client toward topics that align with search intent.](https://fathom.video/share/gyyn_sSZT4ZkS79ksGHmzV5xsbEzy92H?tab=summary&timestamp=1722.0)

### Workflow & Process Improvements

#### Atlas Workflow

  - [**Insight:** Custom outlines are essential for quality drafts, as Atlas's default outlines are poor.](https://fathom.video/share/gyyn_sSZT4ZkS79ksGHmzV5xsbEzy92H?tab=summary&timestamp=605.0)
  - [**Required Editing:** Heavy manual editing is necessary to correct common AI errors:](https://fathom.video/share/gyyn_sSZT4ZkS79ksGHmzV5xsbEzy92H?tab=summary&timestamp=526.0)
      - [Incorrectly cited or uncited statistics.](https://fathom.video/share/gyyn_sSZT4ZkS79ksGHmzV5xsbEzy92H?tab=summary&timestamp=550.0)
      - [Hypothetical examples presented as anonymized case studies.](https://fathom.video/share/gyyn_sSZT4ZkS79ksGHmzV5xsbEzy92H?tab=summary&timestamp=550.0)
  - [**Resource:** Jo's article generation process was cited as a helpful reference.](https://fathom.video/share/gyyn_sSZT4ZkS79ksGHmzV5xsbEzy92H?tab=summary&timestamp=658.0)

#### Otto

  - [**Problem:** New client articles are not indexing, likely due to a technical issue on their site (e.g., page not crawlable).](https://fathom.video/share/gyyn_sSZT4ZkS79ksGHmzV5xsbEzy92H?tab=summary&timestamp=1436.0)
  - [**Solution:** Bailey will investigate today. If the issue persists after manual submission, it will be escalated to Jason.](https://fathom.video/share/gyyn_sSZT4ZkS79ksGHmzV5xsbEzy92H?tab=summary&timestamp=1436.0)

#### Light Source

  - [**Tooling:** Andi suggested experimenting with `pic.ai` for generating infographics.](https://fathom.video/share/gyyn_sSZT4ZkS79ksGHmzV5xsbEzy92H?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
